User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account on the Med-X platform, including students, creators, and administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's unique email address used for login.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the system, determining their permissions and access levels.

isPremium.description: Indicates if the user has an active premium subscription, granting access to exclusive content.

subscriptionExpiresAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user's premium subscription expires. Used to automate downgrading.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was last updated.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp indicating the user's last successful login.

Material.title: Material
Material.description: Represents an educational item such as an e-book, summary, or Q&A pack available on Med-X.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Material entity.

title.description: The title of the educational material.

description.description: A comprehensive description of the material's content and purpose.

type.description: The category or type of the educational material.

level.description: The academic level or target audience for which the material is designed (100 or 200).

categoryId.description: The ID of the course category this material belongs to (e.g., Anatomy ID).

filePath.description: The URI path to the actual digital file of the educational material (e.g., PDF).

coverImage.description: The cover image for the material, stored as a Base64 string or URI.

isPremium.description: Indicates if this material is part of the premium subscription content.

creatorId.description: Reference to the User (creator) who uploaded or authored this material.

uploadDate.description: Timestamp indicating when the material was first uploaded.

lastUpdateDate.description: Timestamp indicating when the material was last updated.

downloads.description: The total number of times the material's file has been accessed.

CourseCategory.title: CourseCategory
CourseCategory.description: A category for organizing e-books (e.g., Anatomy, ICT).

CreatorProfile.title: CreatorProfile
CreatorProfile.description: Stores public-facing profile information for creators.
